/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/X:SENTENCE ON COUNT 1 IS AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 120D/CTS:120/X:THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFENDANT TO ENROLL AND COMPLETE AN 18 MONTH MULTIPLE OFFENDER'S DRUNK DRIVING PROGRAM,/X:THE COURT INDICATES THE DEFENDANT IS ALSO TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR HAVING COMPLETED AN EXTENSIVEINPATIENT REHABILITATION PROGRAM,/IID:2/LVAL/LCHEM/PF525 12/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/RESTV/654:2 IS THE SAME AS COUNT 1 AND//X:THE COURT NOTES THE FOLLOWING FINES AS TO COUNT 2 ARE NOT STAYED:/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/X:SENTENCE ON COUNT 3 SHALL RUN CONCURRENT AS FOLLOWS:/CH3:CJ 40D/CTS:40/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/X:SENTENCE ON COUNT 4 SHALL RUN CONCURRENT AS FOLLOWS:/CH4:CJ 10D/CTS:10/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL ALSO PAY A BASE FINE ON COUNT 4 OF $300 PLUS $930 IN ASSESSMENTS FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $1,230,/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/
